```{.r .cell-code}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)

df <- read_csv("data/data.csv") |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

df |>
  pivot_longer(-date) |>
  ggplot(aes(date, value, color = name)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point()
```
